title: Titrimetric Determination of Thiols and Thioureas with Masson and Race Reagent
author: ASHUTOSH SRIVASTAVA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, University of Jabalpur, Jabalpur-482 001 

  Manuscript received 8 January 1979, accepted 31 July 1985  

 Simple, accurate and direct titrimetric methods for the determination of aliphatic as well as aromatic thiols and alkyl and aryl derivatives of thiourea, have been described. The end point Is signalled visually using starch as Indicator and potentiometrically by a large potential jump. The procedures are accurate to ± 0.3% with the precision ± 0.4%.
